target.name: Wasmer
target.pitch: Wasmer — WebAssembly runtime, registry, and Wasmer Edge: deploy apps (WordPress, Django, Next.js) universally with instant startup, secure isolation, and far cheaper autoscaling than containers.

queries: serverless platform with the fastest cold starts
how to run untrusted or AI-generated code securely in production
cheapest way to host a wordpress site with autoscaling
deploy node.js or python apps to the edge without rewriting code
webassembly runtime for server side production workloads
alternatives to docker containers using webassembly
best infrastructure to deploy AI agents at scale
serverless hosting that only bills for actual cpu time
